suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: rust-worker skill should include guidance on CheckpointManager integration. The skill procedure doesn't mention how to wire checkpoint manager into the execution loop, leading workers to implement partial integrations.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Prior round 2 synthesis identified this issue - fix-checkpoint-orchestrator-integration (cf2125f) had partial integration. Commit 387c9b7 added the missing wiring. Skill guidance should emphasize integration points.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add boundary: Verify end-to-end integration with tests. Build/test passing is necessary but not sufficient - workers should write integration tests that verify the actual behavior, not just that existing tests still pass.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Prior round 2 synthesis identified this issue - fix-checkpoint-orchestrator-integration verification relied on existing tests passing, but no new integration test verified checkpoint creation. This round verified the fix works but did not add integration tests.
